reasoning_content: We need to check if 8867 is prime. Quick sanity check: check divisibility by small primes. 8867 is odd, not divisible by 2. Sum of digits: 8+8+6+7=29, not divisible by 3, so not divisible by 3. Ends with 7, not divisible by 5. Check 7: 7*1266=8862, remainder 5, so not divisible. 11: alternate sum: 8-8+6-7 = -1, not divisible by 11. 13: 13*682=8866, remainder 1, so no. 17: 17*521=8857, remainder 10; 17*522=8874 too big. 19: 19*466=8854, remainder 13; 19*467=8873. 23: 23*385=8855, remainder 12; 23*386=8878. 29: 29*305=8845, remainder 22; 29*306=8874. 31: 31*286=8866, remainder 1. 37: 37*239=8843, remainder 24; 37*240=8880. 41: 41*216=8856, remainder 11; 41*217=8897. 43: 43*206=8858, remainder 9; 43*207=8901. 47: 47*188=8836, remainder 31; 47*189=8883. 53: 53*167=8851, remainder 16; 53*168=8904. 59: 59*150=8850, remainder 17; 59*151=8909. 61: 61*145=8845, remainder 22; 61*146=8906. 67: 67*132=8844, remainder 23; 67*133=8911. 71: 71*124=8804, remainder 63; 71*125=8875, remainder -8 so 8875 is too high? Actually 71*125=8875, that's 8 more than 8867, so no. 73: 73*121=8833, remainder 34; 73*122=8906. 79: 79*112=8848, remainder 19; 79*113=8927. 83: 83*106=8798, remainder 69; 83*107=8881. 89: 89*99=8811, remainder 56; 89*100=8900. 97: 97*91=8827, remainder 40; 97*92=8924. Next prime 101: 101*87=8787, remainder 80; 101*88=8888. Actually sqrt(8867) is about 94.2, so we only need to check primes up to 97. We've checked up to 97. None divided evenly. So 8867 is prime. Quick sanity check: it's not obviously composite. So answer: prime.
